name: Pointnuker_SOR
summary: Separate outliers splats from the denser cloud. Inclues COLMAP editing/saving
description: Statistical Outlier Removal for 3DGS point clouds (ported from PointNuker). Two ways of editing COLMAP: (1) quick Crop & filter COLMAP sparse points in bin/txt or (2) GUI inferface with align, scale, rotation & cropping tools
author: Brian Davis (bb6)
